name: Ronye Arabel
description: Ronye Arabel is Kirito's valet who learns swordsmanship under him in the Sword Mastery Academy. She is the daughter of a 6th class Noble Family; like Tiese, she entered Sword Mastery Academy trying to raise her family status. She was one of the top 12 of her year, so she became a valet, but what she does not know is that Kirito did not choose her. Having grown up in a strict, traditional Japanese household, Yukiho's drink of choice is tea; predominantly green tea. name: Yukiya
description: The "idiot second son" of the head of Tarui Village in the northern region. He was selected as an attendant to the young prince by chance and began working at the imperial court. When he was young, he got lost in the forest and was saved by an unknown crow.

name: Yuuta Hibiki
description: Yuuta has amnesia at the beginning to the extent of not even remembering where he lives. He fuses with Junk to become Gridman. ~!It is later revealed that the Yuuta we have seen throughout the show has been Gridman inside of Yuuta's body the entire time, except he had forgotten who he was (explaining the amnesia).!~

name: Agiri Goshiki
description: A laid-back ninja belonging to the same organization as Sonya. Though she has few appearances, she brings humor with her.

name: Aki Aoi
description: Sora's elder sister. Attractive, athletic, and intelligent, she's considered a model student at school. However, at home, she has no culinary talents and fails to keep her own room clean. She is deeply in love with Sora. She first attempts to have sex with Sora in the shower but is unsuccessful. However, her second attempt, in his room, is successful, and they have engaged in sexual intercourse several times since.

name: Alice Tendou
description: **Height**: 152cm Alice Tendou is a student of Millennium and member of the Game development club. She is a mysterious girl who was found sleeping inside some ruins. All information regarding her origin and age is unknown. Currently, she enjoys playing videogames with [Momoi](https://anilist.co/character/292756/Momoi-Saiba), [Midori](https://anilist.co/character/292757/Midori-Saiba) and [Yuzu](https://anilist.co/character/292759/Yuzu-Hanaoka) and has become a serious video game fanatic. name: Alter Ego
description: An artificial intelligence created by Chihiro Fujisaki. Alter Ego has a kind personality that resembles Chihiro's. When portraying another person, Alter Ego can change their personality, appearance, and voice to mimic that person. It appears that Alter Ego is able to experience and show forms of happiness, determination, and bravery.

As the right-hand man of the deceased Orc Lord, he was given the same name as him, as a memento and token of appreciation, similar to how Rigur was named after his older brother. As an Orc King, he is the leader of the Yellow Corps, that acts as both the last line of defense for Tempest as well as the main team of the country's Department of Construction and Manufacturing. name: Kanata Sorami
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'1") Loves the trumpet. She's a new army recruit who enlisted to learn how to play. A bright and positive person, Kanata brims with curiosity and is easily moved. She sometimes has problems reading the atmosphere, but that ignorance causes her to be happy. She has perfect pitch, but her performances still need work.
